00038 package java.lang;
00039 
00051 public final class Short
00052 {
00057     public static final short MIN_VALUE = -32768;
00058 
00063     public static final short MAX_VALUE = 32767;
00064 
00069     private final short value;
00070 
00077     public Short(short value)
00078     {
00079         this.value = value;
00080     }
00081 
00091     public static short parseShort(String s) throws NumberFormatException
00092     {
00093         return parseShort(s, 10);
00094     }
00095 
00112     public static short parseShort(String s, int radix)
00113         throws NumberFormatException
00114     {
00115         int i = Integer.parseInt(s, radix);
00116     
00117         if ((short) i != i)
00118             throw new NumberFormatException();
00119     
00120         return (short) i;
00121     }
00122 
00128     public short shortValue()
00129     {
00130         return value;
00131     }
00132 
00140     public static String toString(short s)
00141     {
00142         return String.valueOf(s);
00143     }
00144 
00151     public int hashCode()
00152     {
00153         return value;
00154     }
00155 
00163     public boolean equals(Object obj)
00164     {
00165         return obj instanceof Short && value == ((Short) obj).value;
00166     }
00167 }
